subcodes.first_line: O thou who art continually beset by tribulations in the path of God! Although thou art bound by fetters and afflicted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استمر علیه البلاء مسلسلا بالاغلال فی سبیل الله هر چند در زیر زنجیری و مبتلای
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
